title: What am I, if not an AI?
summary: What am I, if not an AI?
whyItMatters: TL:DR I RL fine-tuned Mistral 7B Instruct v0.3 and Llama 3.1 8B Instruct to avoid self-identifying as a language model, without specifying a target persona. Mistral converged on a single recurring persona (Catholic American woman) across most runs. Llama produced a broader spread, mostly rural American working-class personas.
